title: Moderation update: spam and harassment actions completed
body: Today’s abuse queue triage resulted in two enforcement actions: spam_wave_42 was banned for posting phishing links in 6 channels over 20 minutes, and toxic_runner was banned for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. Reports report_001 and report_002 have been closed. report_006 was identified as a false positive involving core_maintainer and was closed without action. No action was taken against trusted members.
